mapper.select: select video_id, video_type, title, description, create_time, author_id, nick_name, video_url, video_cover_url, liked_count, disliked_count, video_play_count, video_favorite_count, video_share_count, video_coin_count, status, source_keyword from videos

select video_id, video_type, title, description, create_time, author_id, nick_name, video_url, video_cover_url, liked_count, disliked_count, video_play_count, video_favorite_count, video_share_count, video_coin_count, status, source_keyword from videos where video_id = #{id} limit 1

select video_id, video_type, title, description, create_time, author_id, nick_name, video_url, video_cover_url, liked_count, disliked_count, video_play_count, video_favorite_count, video_share_count, video_coin_count, status, source_keyword from videos order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select video_id, video_type, title, description, create_time, author_id, nick_name, video_url, video_cover_url, liked_count, disliked_count, video_play_count, video_favorite_count, video_share_count, video_coin_count, status, source_keyword from videos where title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') order by create_time desc

select video_id, video_type, title, description, create_time, author_id, nick_name, video_url, video_cover_url, liked_count, disliked_count, video_play_count, video_favorite_count, video_share_count, video_coin_count, status, source_keyword from videos where title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
select count(*) from videos where title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE videos SET liked_count = #{likedCount}, video_favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, video_share_count = #{shareCount}, video_coin_count = #{coinCount}, video_play_count = #{viewCount} WHERE video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.select:
SELECT vd.video_id, vd.video_type, vd.title, vd.description, vd.create_time, vd.author_id, vd.nick_name, vd.video_url, vd.video_cover_url, vd.liked_count, vd.disliked_count, vd.video_play_count, vd.video_favorite_count, vd.video_share_count, vd.video_coin_count, vd.status FROM videos vd WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY vd.video_play_count DESC, vd.create_time DESC
ORDER BY vd.liked_count DESC, vd.create_time DESC
ORDER BY vd.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT video_id, video_type, title, description, create_time, author_id, nick_name, video_url, video_cover_url, liked_count, disliked_count, video_play_count, video_favorite_count, video_share_count, video_coin_count, status, source_keyword FROM videos WHERE source_keyword = #{sourceKeyword} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{size, jdbcType=INTEGER}
